_comment: Contact details (email, phone) are plausible placeholder-format examples for demo purposes only and must be verified before real-world use.

listings.name: Oracle OPERA Cloud
listings.description: Oracle OPERA Cloud is a cloud-native property management system used by hotel chains and independent properties worldwide to manage reservations, front desk, housekeeping, and revenue operations. It integrates with a large ecosystem of sales and catering, distribution, and payment applications through Oracle's OHIP APIs.

listings.name: Cloudbeds
listings.description: Cloudbeds provides a unified hospitality management platform combining PMS, channel manager, booking engine, and revenue management for independent hotels, hostels, and vacation rentals. Its cloud architecture is designed for ease of use by small and mid-sized property operators.

listings.name: Mews
listings.description: Mews is a cloud-native property management platform that serves hotels, hostels, and apartment operators with automation-first tools for check-in, billing, and guest engagement. It offers an open API and app marketplace that lets properties assemble a customized tech stack.

listings.name: eZee Absolute
listings.description: eZee Absolute is a cloud and on-premise hotel PMS from eZee Technosys, popular with budget and mid-market hotels across Asia and the Middle East. It bundles front office, housekeeping, and reporting with the company's own channel manager and booking engine.

listings.name: Hotelogix
listings.description: Hotelogix is a cloud-based hotel management system aimed at independent hotels and small chains, offering front desk, booking engine, channel manager, and travel agent modules in one platform. It is widely adopted across India, Southeast Asia, and the Middle East.

listings.name: protel (Planet)
listings.description: protel is a hotel property management system, now part of Planet, offering on-premise and cloud PMS deployments popular across Europe. It provides front office, back office, and integrated payment processing tailored for hotel groups and independents.
usps: Backed by Planet's global payments network

listings.name: RMS Cloud
listings.description: RMS Cloud is a cloud-based property management system serving hotels, holiday parks, and multi-site accommodation operators, with strong penetration in Australia, New Zealand, and North America. It offers integrated distribution, point of sale, and revenue management tools.

listings.name: Little Hotelier
listings.description: Little Hotelier, a SiteMinder product, is a simplified cloud PMS and booking platform designed specifically for small properties such as B&Bs, guesthouses, and boutique hotels. It bundles front desk operations with a channel manager and direct booking engine.

listings.name: StayFlexi
listings.description: StayFlexi is a cloud-based PMS and revenue management platform targeting independent hotels and hostels, with dynamic pricing and flexible booking rules as core differentiators. It is used across the US and India for automated rate optimization.

listings.name: innRoad
listings.description: innRoad is a cloud PMS provider focused on independent hotels in North America, offering an all-in-one system with booking engine, channel management, and payment processing. It emphasizes simple pricing and dedicated customer support for small hotel operators.

listings.name: Clock PMS (Clock Software)
listings.description: Clock PMS is a cloud property management platform from Clock Software targeting hotels and hotel groups in Europe and beyond, offering guest-facing self-service tools alongside traditional front office functions. It supports multi-property and franchise operations.

listings.name: Frontdesk Anywhere
listings.description: Frontdesk Anywhere is a cloud-based hotel management system providing reservations, front desk, and channel management for independent hotels and small groups, primarily in North America. It focuses on straightforward usability and quick deployment.

listings.name: Agilysys
listings.description: Agilysys provides property management, point-of-sale, and inventory solutions primarily for full-service hotels, resorts, and casinos. Its PMS suite integrates with its own POS and payments products to support complex hospitality operations.

listings.name: Guestline
listings.description: Guestline is a UK-based hospitality technology provider offering cloud PMS, EPoS, and revenue management tools for hotel groups, pubs, and serviced apartments. Its platform integrates distribution and payment processing for mid-market operators.

listings.name: Maestro PMS
listings.description: Maestro PMS by NORTHWIND is a fully integrated property management platform for independent hotels, resorts, and multi-property groups, offered in both cloud and on-premise deployments. It covers reservations, spa, activities, and accounting in a single suite.

listings.name: WebRezPro
listings.description: WebRezPro is a cloud-based property management system from World Web Technologies, serving hotels, hostels, vacation rentals, and campgrounds. It provides an all-in-one suite covering reservations, channel distribution, and guest communication.

listings.name: Hostaway
listings.description: Hostaway is a vacation rental property management platform helping short-term rental managers automate messaging, channel distribution, and operations across listings on Airbnb, Vrbo, and Booking.com. It targets property managers scaling multi-unit portfolios.

listings.name: Skyware Hotel Systems
listings.description: Skyware Hotel Systems provides a cloud PMS designed for independent hotels and small groups, with modules covering front office, group blocks, and rate management. It is used across Europe, Africa, and the Middle East by mid-sized properties.
